query:
UPDATE error_groups g
SET
    occurrence_count = (
        SELECT COUNT(*)::int
        FROM error_occurrences
        WHERE error_group_id = g.id
    ),
    last_seen_at = COALESCE(
        (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM error_occurrences WHERE error_group_id = g.id),
        g.created_at
    ),
    updated_at = now()
WHERE g.id = ANY($1)
